ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the individual */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status of the individual (0 for unmarried, 1 for married) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" INTEGER /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "nationality" INTEGER /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the individual */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the individual has a disability */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the individual */,
  "employment_status" INTEGER /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income bracket of the individual */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "settlement_size" INTEGER /* Settlement size where the individual resides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_settlement_size FOREIGN KEY ("settlement_size") REFERENCES settlement_sizes ("settlement_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this sex is the default option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this marital status is the default option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this education level is the default option */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Average duration in years for this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this occupation is the default option */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title within the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlement_sizes" (
  "settlement_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settlement size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the settlement size */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this settlement size is the default option */,
  "population_range" TEXT /* Range of population for this settlement size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settlement_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "bracket_description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this income bracket is the default option */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of income for this bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual for whom the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, socioeconomic) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_reports_report_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_reports_report_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_reports_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data is updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., demographic, socioeconomic) */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the update */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update has been approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_companies" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the client accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_access_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_companies ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client using the data */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., analysis, reporting) */,
  "usage_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data usage occurred */,
  "usage_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data usage occurred */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the data usage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_companies ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
